behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels for attendee attribution.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real AI/ML speech-to-text diarization output (who spoke what). A mock STT response would hide diarization failures. Rejected Workflow: behavior text focuses on a single model-output property ('speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels'), not a multi-agentic sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real multi-speaker meeting audio file through the production STT API and assert the produced transcript keeps speaker labels per utterance and preserves them in the payload consumed for attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is parser logic over transcript text and schema mapping within a local function/object boundary. Rejected Integration: behavior text is about extraction itself ('Transcript parsing extracts...into...structure'), not downstream module handoff correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Unit-test the assignment-extraction function with transcript fixtures containing explicit assignments; assert exact assignee and task text fields in the generated summary-input structure.

behaviors.description: Live summary contains at least one action item for every attendee assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: This asserts summary content quality from a real LLM decision (coverage across assigned attendees). Deterministic stubs can always satisfy coverage and hide real misses. Rejected Workflow: behavior wording targets one summary output constraint, not an explicit multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Send a transcript/summary-input fixture with assignments for multiple attendees to the real summarization model and assert the live output has at least one action item per assigned attendee.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into `decisions` schema section, not narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: The failure boundary is local routing/mapping logic after decisions are already identified. Rejected Integration: behavior text explicitly scopes to routing ('routes identified decisions'), which can be validated at the mapper/function boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Unit-test the decision-routing mapper with pre-identified decision inputs and narrative inputs; assert decisions populate only the `decisions` section and are excluded from generic narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions in transcript appear in live summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM extraction/structuring quality from transcript content. Mocked summaries would hide omission/misplacement failures. Rejected Workflow: behavior asks for one output-quality condition in the live summary, not an explicit multi-step agentic pipeline requirement.
behaviors.test_description: Use a transcript fixture containing clearly stated decisions, call the real summarization model, and assert each key decision appears in the output `decisions` section rather than only in narrative text.

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service splits into segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires multi-step sequential processing and merge quality across segment outputs ('splits...processes...merging...coherent summary'). This is multiple agentic steps in sequence, so Workflow is the minimum level.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through the pipeline with segmenting enabled, verify sequential segment processing occurs, then assert merged final summary is coherent across segments (retains cross-segment actions/decisions, no segment-loss artifacts).

behaviors.description: Full pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is end-to-end orchestration with real infrastructure and multiple agentic stages (STT + LLM summarization) chained without manual intervention. Minimum real-failure boundary is full workflow.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a production-like end-to-end run on a real meeting audio file: upload, transcription API call, LLM summarization, and structured output delivery; assert successful completion and valid structured payload without human intervention.
